title: The Anti-Palantir Manifesto
excerpt: 1. Programmers working on the Internet have a moral responsibility to the entire world, not a single country. The Internet has been designed since its inception...
content_html:
by Anonymous · July 20, 2026

  1. Programmers working on the Internet have a moral responsibility to the entire world, not a single country. The Internet has been designed since its inception as a universal system for the sharing of knowledge without censorship. The Internet is not the property of any one government or nation.
  2. The Internet enables mass surveillance at a scale unimaginable to the Gestapo and the Cheka. Far too many programmers have wasted their lives building surveillance systems under the guise of Web advertising. Today, these web tracking systems are being used to monitor, control, and even kill humans by companies like Palantir that seek to combine state violence with corporate efficiency, and thus create a new form of technofascism.
  3. Surveillance justified by external national security threats will be turned against citizens inside the nation-state. Mass surveillance was once the exclusive domain of the NSA, but today it has been privatized to corporations like Palantir that are unaccountable to any democratic process. What begins as fear of external foreign nation-states turns inwards to focus on immigrants, dissidents, and eventually anyone that might challenge the status quo or try to exit an increasingly dysfunctional society.
  4. Everyone is a target. The “enemy within” continually expands until it encompasses the entire population of a nation regardless of their status and beliefs, justifying evermore paranoid and totalizing surveillance. The line between policing and military operations blurs, with legal frameworks being replaced by technological violence operating with total impunity.
  5. Surveillance can only be defeated by building software and hardware to defend ourselves. Meek calls for regulation or moralizing demands for human rights are useless in this era. Any rights must be enforced by the hard power of code. Code, not laws, can be used to uphold the right to privacy by making surveillance difficult, if not impossible, even by nation-state adversaries.
  6. We are ruled by a senile gerontocracy. Unlike the generations that fought in the world wars, most of our current rulers are degenerate pedophiles who would sacrifice the well-being of the youth and the entire planet due to their infantile desire for wealth and power. Technologies of surveillance and automated warfare reflect their increasingly desperate attempts to maintain archaic forms of domination.
  7. The American Empire is unraveling. Once, the United States of America presided over a globe where it could enforce its rule via the status of the dollar as a global reserve currency and a network of equally global military bases. Today, new regional powers directly challenge the United States as its empire dissolves in the face of internal economic stagnation, political corruption, and the inflation of the dollar.
  8. In a real war, fantasies of total technological dominance always backfire. When a faceless drone kills a child’s father, that child will one day take revenge regardless of the cost. This is something forgotten by those raised in comfortable suburbs. Going beyond zero-sum games, one can only truly win a battle against a people by demonstrating that your victory provides a better way of life, increased prosperity, and an inspiring philosophy.
  9. Oddly enough, proponents of fully automated warfare support a universal draft. Deep-down, these keyboard warriors know that their techno-fascist fantasies are a paper tiger when up against determined opponents that engage in asymmetric warfare. They also know none of their children will fight in a war for their state, but they would be happy to see other people’s children come home in body-bags.
  10. The problem is not whether AI weapons will be built; we must hold responsible those who are building them. No matter which country is deploying automated killing machines, no one is absolved from the murder of civilians and the destruction of infrastructure due to the parlour-trick of shifting the blame to AI.
  11. Atomic war is on the horizon. As various states descend into wars over increasingly scarce natural resources, the possibility of tactical nuclear strikes over Tehran, Kyiv, and other areas of conflict has returned to the historical stage. Increasingly geriatric and authoritarian rulers face less guardrails than before to deploying nuclear weapons, and may even be willing to sacrifice the survival of humanity to appease their own petty egos.
  12. Our goal is a world of peace where every person can be empowered by the Internet. Modern war is the quintessential game of sending young people to the meat-grinder. Why die for the profit of corrupt rulers when one could build real wealth and power for yourself using the Internet?
  13. We should fight for the world we want, and build the tools needed by future generations. Pacifism would be suicidal in this period of global turbulence and resource wars, but real hard power lies in technology: Programmers should be creating technologies to live a free life and prosper in a hostile society of surveillance and control. Decentralization is the only way these technologies will survive against the inevitable repression.
  14. The State will not help us. The state is a dying pre-Internet institution that increasingly resembles nothing but a Ponzi scheme fueled by taxes and debt. None of the youth alive today will likely inherit any benefits, such as welfare and health care. Technology can support an alternative: The decentralization of power to the individual and communities that they join voluntarily.
  15. Centralized and opaque algorithms are a danger to free speech. Propaganda is the flip-side of surveillance, as continual propaganda prevents anyone from even thinking of challenging the system. Social media monopolies promote propaganda to create a generalized idiocy while silencing those that would dare to criticize the reigning order before they can organize against it.
  16. Building new forms of social organization with each other is vital to survival. The traditional mediascape of politics and entertainment exists to distract us from building networked solidarity and distributed autonomous organizations across borders. The hierarchical state is as relevant to us as the medieval church and kings were to the formation of the joint-stock corporation and the labor union.
  17. Digital identity is the next step in their system of control. Within the next few years, access to the Internet – including in Europe and the United States – will require biometric national identity cards, using the flimsy excuse of “protecting children.” The real goal is to gatekeep free access to subversive political content and halt cross-border communication in order to prevent new forms of self-organization and resistance from emerging.
  18. Only when one can be anonymous is one truly free. The freedom to express oneself without censorship and surveillance is a vital precondition for both the autonomous use of reason and the democratic evolution of society. Technology must enable the freedom to selectively reveal ourselves to the world – so that we can become who we want to be – by preserving the right to privacy over the Internet, including not just individual privacy, but also the right to transact and form contracts privately.
  19. America created the first global surveillance state, but it will not be the last. Too many have forgotten, or perhaps taken for granted, the revelations of Wikileaks and Snowden. States across the world from China to Russia are creating even more powerful global surveillance systems and propaganda machines. Leveraging private defense contracts in countries across the world, Palantir seeks to make itself the operating system of a cross-border global secret state while it pushes its own farcical version of ethno-nationalism.
  20. Culture wars are a psyop. The “Epstein class” virtue-signals about morality and the superiority of their civilization, all while trying to return to the rule of hereditary elites, even in the United States. Rather than reverse the gains of the Enlightenment, we take the side of our ancestors who fought a centuries-long battle for individual liberty, scientific progress, decentralized markets, bottom-up democracy, and the emancipation of humanity from feudal monarchs and their make-believe mythologies.
  21. New forms of technology can reshape the world. Technology is not just a tool, but the world we live in and an extension of our cognitive capabilities. The co-operation of humans with the collective intelligence embedded in AI could accelerate human progress and overcome planetary crises such as climate change and atomic war that threatens the survival of our species.
  22. Live free or die trying. We must bear eternal vigilance in the struggle against fascism, and the battlefield is technology. There is no middle ground: Technologists must choose whether to work for the enslavement of humanity or to create new spaces for freedom.

sentences.en: by Anonymous · July 20, 2026
sentences.zh: 作者：匿名·2026 年 7 月 20 日

blocks.html_en: • Programmers working on the Internet have a moral responsibility to the entire world, not a single country. The Internet has been designed since its inception as a universal system for the sharing of knowledge without censorship. The Internet is not the property of any one government or nation.

sentences.en: Programmers working on the Internet have a moral responsibility to the entire world, not a single country.
sentences.zh: 在互联网上工作的程序员对整个世界而不是某个国家负有道义责任。

sentences.en: The Internet has been designed since its inception as a universal system for the sharing of knowledge without censorship.
sentences.zh: 互联网自诞生之日起就被设计为一个无需审查即可共享知识的通用系统。

sentences.en: The Internet is not the property of any one government or nation.
sentences.zh: 互联网不是任何一个政府或国家的财产。

blocks.html_en: • The Internet enables mass surveillance at a scale unimaginable to the Gestapo and the Cheka. Far too many programmers have wasted their lives building surveillance systems under the guise of Web advertising. Today, these web tracking systems are being used to monitor, control, and even kill humans by companies like Palantir that seek to combine state violence with corporate efficiency, and thus create a new form of technofascism.

sentences.en: The Internet enables mass surveillance at a scale unimaginable to the Gestapo and the Cheka.
sentences.zh: 互联网使大规模监视成为可能，其规模是盖世太保和契卡难以想象的。

sentences.en: Far too many programmers have wasted their lives building surveillance systems under the guise of Web advertising.
sentences.zh: 太多的程序员浪费了生命来构建打着网络广告幌子的监控系统。

sentences.en: Today, these web tracking systems are being used to monitor, control, and even kill humans by companies like Palantir that seek to combine state violence with corporate efficiency, and thus create a new form of technofascism.
sentences.zh: 如今，Palantir 等公司正在使用这些网络跟踪系统来监视、控制甚至杀害人类，这些公司寻求将国家暴力与企业效率结合起来，从而创造一种新形式的技术法西斯主义。

blocks.html_en: • Surveillance justified by external national security threats will be turned against citizens inside the nation-state. Mass surveillance was once the exclusive domain of the NSA, but today it has been privatized to corporations like Palantir that are unaccountable to any democratic process. What begins as fear of external foreign nation-states turns inwards to focus on immigrants, dissidents, and eventually anyone that might challenge the status quo or try to exit an increasingly dysfunctional society.

sentences.en: Surveillance justified by external national security threats will be turned against citizens inside the nation-state.
sentences.zh: 以外部国家安全威胁为由的监视将转向民族国家内部的公民。

sentences.en: Mass surveillance was once the exclusive domain of the NSA, but today it has been privatized to corporations like Palantir that are unaccountable to any democratic process.
sentences.zh: 大规模监视曾经是国家安全局的专属领域，但如今它已被私有化给像 Palantir 这样的公司，这些公司对任何民主进程都不负责。

sentences.en: What begins as fear of external foreign nation-states turns inwards to focus on immigrants, dissidents, and eventually anyone that might challenge the status quo or try to exit an increasingly dysfunctional society.
sentences.zh: 一开始是对外部外国民族国家的恐惧，后来转向内部，关注移民、持不同政见者，最终关注任何可能挑战现状或试图退出日益功能失调的社会的人。

blocks.html_en: • Everyone is a target. The “enemy within” continually expands until it encompasses the entire population of a nation regardless of their status and beliefs, justifying evermore paranoid and totalizing surveillance. The line between policing and military operations blurs, with legal frameworks being replaced by technological violence operating with total impunity.

sentences.en: Everyone is a target.
sentences.zh: 每个人都是目标。

sentences.en: The “enemy within” continually expands until it encompasses the entire population of a nation regardless of their status and beliefs, justifying evermore paranoid and totalizing surveillance.
sentences.zh: “内部敌人”不断扩大，直到涵盖一个国家的全体人民，无论他们的地位和信仰如何，这就证明了更加偏执和全面的监视是合理的。

sentences.en: The line between policing and military operations blurs, with legal frameworks being replaced by technological violence operating with total impunity.
sentences.zh: 警务和军事行动之间的界限变得模糊，法律框架被技术暴力所取代，而且完全不受惩罚。

blocks.html_en: • Surveillance can only be defeated by building software and hardware to defend ourselves. Meek calls for regulation or moralizing demands for human rights are useless in this era. Any rights must be enforced by the hard power of code. Code, not laws, can be used to uphold the right to privacy by making surveillance difficult, if not impossible, even by nation-state adversaries.

sentences.en: Surveillance can only be defeated by building software and hardware to defend ourselves.
sentences.zh: 只能通过构建软件和硬件来保卫自己来击败监视。

sentences.en: Meek calls for regulation or moralizing demands for human rights are useless in this era.
sentences.zh: 温顺地呼吁监管或道德化地要求人权在这个时代是没有用的。

sentences.en: Any rights must be enforced by the hard power of code.
sentences.zh: 任何权利都必须通过代码的硬实力来执行。

sentences.en: Code, not laws, can be used to uphold the right to privacy by making surveillance difficult, if not impossible, even by nation-state adversaries.
sentences.zh: 代码（而不是法律）可以用来维护隐私权，使监视变得困难（如果不是不可能的话），即使是民族国家的对手也是如此。

blocks.html_en: • We are ruled by a senile gerontocracy. Unlike the generations that fought in the world wars, most of our current rulers are degenerate pedophiles who would sacrifice the well-being of the youth and the entire planet due to their infantile desire for wealth and power. Technologies of surveillance and automated warfare reflect their increasingly desperate attempts to maintain archaic forms of domination.

sentences.en: We are ruled by a senile gerontocracy.
sentences.zh: 我们是由老年老人统治的。

sentences.en: Unlike the generations that fought in the world wars, most of our current rulers are degenerate pedophiles who would sacrifice the well-being of the youth and the entire planet due to their infantile desire for wealth and power.
sentences.zh: 与参加世界大战的几代人不同，我们现在的统治者大多数都是堕落的恋童癖者，他们会因为对财富和权力的幼稚渴望而牺牲年轻人和整个地球的福祉。

sentences.en: Technologies of surveillance and automated warfare reflect their increasingly desperate attempts to maintain archaic forms of domination.
sentences.zh: 监视和自动化战争技术反映出他们日益绝望地试图维持古老的统治形式。

blocks.html_en: • The American Empire is unraveling. Once, the United States of America presided over a globe where it could enforce its rule via the status of the dollar as a global reserve currency and a network of equally global military bases. Today, new regional powers directly challenge the United States as its empire dissolves in the face of internal economic stagnation, political corruption, and the inflation of the dollar.

sentences.en: The American Empire is unraveling.
sentences.zh: 美利坚帝国正在瓦解。

sentences.en: Once, the United States of America presided over a globe where it could enforce its rule via the status of the dollar as a global reserve currency and a network of equally global military bases.
sentences.zh: 曾经，美利坚合众国统治着一个可以通过美元作为全球储备货币的地位和同样的全球军事基地网络来执行其统治的世界。

sentences.en: Today, new regional powers directly challenge the United States as its empire dissolves in the face of internal economic stagnation, political corruption, and the inflation of the dollar.
sentences.zh: 如今，随着美国帝国因内部经济停滞、政治腐败和美元通胀而解体，新的地区大国直接挑战美国。

blocks.html_en: • In a real war, fantasies of total technological dominance always backfire. When a faceless drone kills a child’s father, that child will one day take revenge regardless of the cost. This is something forgotten by those raised in comfortable suburbs. Going beyond zero-sum games, one can only truly win a battle against a people by demonstrating that your victory provides a better way of life, increased prosperity, and an inspiring philosophy.

sentences.en: In a real war, fantasies of total technological dominance always backfire.
sentences.zh: 在真正的战争中，全面技术主导的幻想总是会适得其反。

sentences.en: When a faceless drone kills a child’s father, that child will one day take revenge regardless of the cost.
sentences.zh: 当一架不露面的无人机杀死了一个孩子的父亲时，那个孩子有一天会不惜一切代价进行报复。

sentences.en: This is something forgotten by those raised in comfortable suburbs.
sentences.zh: 这是那些在舒适的郊区长大的人所忘记的事情。

sentences.en: Going beyond zero-sum games, one can only truly win a battle against a people by demonstrating that your victory provides a better way of life, increased prosperity, and an inspiring philosophy.
sentences.zh: 超越零和游戏，只有证明你的胜利提供了更好的生活方式、更多的繁荣和鼓舞人心的哲学，才能真正赢得一场与人民的战斗。

blocks.html_en: • Oddly enough, proponents of fully automated warfare support a universal draft. They also know none of their children will fight in a war for their state, but they would be happy to see other people’s children come home in body-bags.

sentences.en: Oddly enough, proponents of fully automated warfare support a universal draft.
sentences.zh: 奇怪的是，全自动战争的支持者支持通用草案。

sentences.en: Deep-down, these keyboard warriors know that their techno-fascist fantasies are a paper tiger when up against determined opponents that engage in asymmetric warfare.
sentences.zh: 在内心深处，这些键盘战士知道，当面对进行不对称战争的坚定对手时，他们的技术法西斯幻想只是纸老虎。

sentences.en: They also know none of their children will fight in a war for their state, but they would be happy to see other people’s children come home in body-bags.
sentences.zh: 他们也知道自己的孩子不会为自己的国家而战，但他们会很高兴看到别人的孩子装在裹尸袋里回家。

blocks.html_en: • The problem is not whether AI weapons will be built; we must hold responsible those who are building them. No matter which country is deploying automated killing machines, no one is absolved from the murder of civilians and the destruction of infrastructure due to the parlour-trick of shifting the blame to AI.

sentences.en: The problem is not whether AI weapons will be built; we must hold responsible those who are building them.
sentences.zh: 问题不在于是否会制造人工智能武器，而在于是否会制造人工智能武器。我们必须让建设者承担责任。

sentences.en: No matter which country is deploying automated killing machines, no one is absolved from the murder of civilians and the destruction of infrastructure due to the parlour-trick of shifting the blame to AI.
sentences.zh: 无论哪个国家部署自动杀人机器，都无法避免因将责任归咎于人工智能的花招而导致平民被谋杀和基础设施被破坏的情况。

blocks.html_en: • Atomic war is on the horizon. As various states descend into wars over increasingly scarce natural resources, the possibility of tactical nuclear strikes over Tehran, Kyiv, and other areas of conflict has returned to the historical stage. Increasingly geriatric and authoritarian rulers face less guardrails than before to deploying nuclear weapons, and may even be willing to sacrifice the survival of humanity to appease their own petty egos.

sentences.en: Atomic war is on the horizon.
sentences.zh: 原子战争即将来临。

sentences.en: As various states descend into wars over increasingly scarce natural resources, the possibility of tactical nuclear strikes over Tehran, Kyiv, and other areas of conflict has returned to the historical stage.
sentences.zh: 随着各国争夺日益稀缺的自然资源而陷入战争，对德黑兰、基辅和其他冲突地区进行战术核打击的可能性又回到了历史舞台。

sentences.en: Increasingly geriatric and authoritarian rulers face less guardrails than before to deploying nuclear weapons, and may even be willing to sacrifice the survival of humanity to appease their own petty egos.
sentences.zh: 日益衰老和专制的统治者在部署核武器方面面临的障碍比以前更少，甚至可能愿意牺牲人类的生存来安抚自己的狭隘自负。

blocks.html_en: • Our goal is a world of peace where every person can be empowered by the Internet. Modern war is the quintessential game of sending young people to the meat-grinder. Why die for the profit of corrupt rulers when one could build real wealth and power for yourself using the Internet?

sentences.en: Our goal is a world of peace where every person can be empowered by the Internet.
sentences.zh: 我们的目标是建立一个和平的世界，让每个人都能通过互联网获得力量。

sentences.en: Modern war is the quintessential game of sending young people to the meat-grinder.
sentences.zh: 现代战争是将年轻人送上绞肉机的典型游戏。

sentences.en: Why die for the profit of corrupt rulers when one could build real wealth and power for yourself using the Internet?
sentences.zh: 当一个人可以利用互联网为自己创造真正的财富和权力时，为什么要为腐败统治者的利益而牺牲呢？

blocks.html_en: • We should fight for the world we want, and build the tools needed by future generations. Pacifism would be suicidal in this period of global turbulence and resource wars, but real hard power lies in technology: Programmers should be creating technologies to live a free life and prosper in a hostile society of surveillance and control. Decentralization is the only way these technologies will survive against the inevitable repression.

sentences.en: We should fight for the world we want, and build the tools needed by future generations.
sentences.zh: 我们应该为我们想要的世界而奋斗，并打造子孙后代所需的工具。

sentences.en: Pacifism would be suicidal in this period of global turbulence and resource wars, but real hard power lies in technology: Programmers should be creating technologies to live a free life and prosper in a hostile society of surveillance and control.
sentences.zh: 在这个全球动荡和资源战争的时期，和平主义无异于自杀，但真正的硬实力在于技术：程序员应该创造技术，以便在充满敌意的监视和控制的社会中过上自由的生活并繁荣发展。

sentences.en: Decentralization is the only way these technologies will survive against the inevitable repression.
sentences.zh: 去中心化是这些技术在不可避免的压制下生存的唯一途径。

blocks.html_en: • The State will not help us. The state is a dying pre-Internet institution that increasingly resembles nothing but a Ponzi scheme fueled by taxes and debt. None of the youth alive today will likely inherit any benefits, such as welfare and health care. Technology can support an alternative: The decentralization of power to the individual and communities that they join voluntarily.

sentences.en: The State will not help us.
sentences.zh: 国家不会帮助我们。

sentences.en: The state is a dying pre-Internet institution that increasingly resembles nothing but a Ponzi scheme fueled by taxes and debt.
sentences.zh: 国家是一个垂死的前互联网机构，它越来越像一个由税收和债务推动的庞氏骗局。

sentences.en: None of the youth alive today will likely inherit any benefits, such as welfare and health care.
sentences.zh: 今天活着的年轻人都不可能继承任何福利，例如福利和医疗保健。

sentences.en: Technology can support an alternative: The decentralization of power to the individual and communities that they join voluntarily.
sentences.zh: 技术可以支持另一种选择：将权力下放给个人和他们自愿加入的社区。

blocks.html_en: • Centralized and opaque algorithms are a danger to free speech. Propaganda is the flip-side of surveillance, as continual propaganda prevents anyone from even thinking of challenging the system. Social media monopolies promote propaganda to create a generalized idiocy while silencing those that would dare to criticize the reigning order before they can organize against it.

sentences.en: Centralized and opaque algorithms are a danger to free speech.
sentences.zh: 中心化且不透明的算法对言论自由构成威胁。

sentences.en: Propaganda is the flip-side of surveillance, as continual propaganda prevents anyone from even thinking of challenging the system.
sentences.zh: 宣传是监视的另一面，因为持续的宣传会阻止任何人想到挑战这个体系。

sentences.en: Social media monopolies promote propaganda to create a generalized idiocy while silencing those that would dare to criticize the reigning order before they can organize against it.
sentences.zh: 社交媒体垄断企业促进宣传，制造普遍的愚蠢行为，同时压制那些敢于批评统治秩序的人，然后他们才能组织起来反对它。

blocks.html_en: • Building new forms of social organization with each other is vital to survival. The traditional mediascape of politics and entertainment exists to distract us from building networked solidarity and distributed autonomous organizations across borders. The hierarchical state is as relevant to us as the medieval church and kings were to the formation of the joint-stock corporation and the labor union.

sentences.en: Building new forms of social organization with each other is vital to survival.
sentences.zh: 相互建立新的社会组织形式对于生存至关重要。

sentences.en: The traditional mediascape of politics and entertainment exists to distract us from building networked solidarity and distributed autonomous organizations across borders.
sentences.zh: 政治和娱乐的传统媒体景观的存在分散了我们对建立跨境网络团结和分布式自治组织的注意力。

sentences.en: The hierarchical state is as relevant to us as the medieval church and kings were to the formation of the joint-stock corporation and the labor union.
sentences.zh: 等级制国家与我们的关系就像中世纪教会和国王与股份公司和工会的形成一样重要。

blocks.html_en: • Digital identity is the next step in their system of control. Within the next few years, access to the Internet – including in Europe and the United States – will require biometric national identity cards, using the flimsy excuse of “protecting children.” The real goal is to gatekeep free access to subversive political content and halt cross-border communication in order to prevent new forms of self-organization and resistance from emerging.

sentences.en: Digital identity is the next step in their system of control.
sentences.zh: 数字身份是他们控制系统的下一步。

sentences.en: Within the next few years, access to the Internet – including in Europe and the United States – will require biometric national identity cards, using the flimsy excuse of “protecting children.”
sentences.zh: 未来几年内，访问互联网（包括在欧洲和美国）将需要生物识别国民身份证，并以“保护儿童”为借口。

sentences.en: The real goal is to gatekeep free access to subversive political content and halt cross-border communication in order to prevent new forms of self-organization and resistance from emerging.
sentences.zh: 真正的目标是控制颠覆性政治内容的自由获取并阻止跨境交流，以防止新形式的自组织和抵抗的出现。

blocks.html_en: • Only when one can be anonymous is one truly free. The freedom to express oneself without censorship and surveillance is a vital precondition for both the autonomous use of reason and the democratic evolution of society. Technology must enable the freedom to selectively reveal ourselves to the world – so that we can become who we want to be – by preserving the right to privacy over the Internet, including not just individual privacy, but also the right to transact and form contracts privately.

sentences.en: Only when one can be anonymous is one truly free.
sentences.zh: 只有当一个人能够匿名时，他才是真正的自由。

sentences.en: The freedom to express oneself without censorship and surveillance is a vital precondition for both the autonomous use of reason and the democratic evolution of society.
sentences.zh: 不受审查和监视的表达自由是理性的自主运用和社会民主进化的重要先决条件。

sentences.en: Technology must enable the freedom to selectively reveal ourselves to the world – so that we can become who we want to be – by preserving the right to privacy over the Internet, including not just individual privacy, but also the right to transact and form contracts privately.
sentences.zh: 技术必须通过保护互联网上的隐私权（不仅包括个人隐私，还包括私下交易和签订合同的权利），使我们能够有选择地向世界展示自己的自由，以便我们能够成为我们想成为的人。

blocks.html_en: • America created the first global surveillance state, but it will not be the last. Too many have forgotten, or perhaps taken for granted, the revelations of Wikileaks and Snowden. States across the world from China to Russia are creating even more powerful global surveillance systems and propaganda machines. Leveraging private defense contracts in countries across the world, Palantir seeks to make itself the operating system of a cross-border global secret state while it pushes its own farcical version of ethno-nationalism.

sentences.en: America created the first global surveillance state, but it will not be the last.
sentences.zh: 美国创建了第一个全球监视国家，但它不会是最后一个。

sentences.en: Too many have forgotten, or perhaps taken for granted, the revelations of Wikileaks and Snowden.
sentences.zh: 太多人已经忘记了维基解密和斯诺登的揭露，或者可能认为这是理所当然的。

sentences.en: States across the world from China to Russia are creating even more powerful global surveillance systems and propaganda machines.
sentences.zh: 从中国到俄罗斯，世界各国正在创建更强大的全球监视系统和宣传机器。

sentences.en: Leveraging private defense contracts in countries across the world, Palantir seeks to make itself the operating system of a cross-border global secret state while it pushes its own farcical version of ethno-nationalism.
sentences.zh: Palantir 利用世界各国的私人防务合同，试图将自己打造成一个跨境全球秘密国家的操作系统，同时推行自己滑稽的民族主义版本。

blocks.html_en: • Culture wars are a psyop. The “Epstein class” virtue-signals about morality and the superiority of their civilization, all while trying to return to the rule of hereditary elites, even in the United States. Rather than reverse the gains of the Enlightenment, we take the side of our ancestors who fought a centuries-long battle for individual liberty, scientific progress, decentralized markets, bottom-up democracy, and the emancipation of humanity from feudal monarchs and their make-believe mythologies.

sentences.en: Culture wars are a psyop.
sentences.zh: 文化战争是一场心理战。

sentences.en: The “Epstein class” virtue-signals about morality and the superiority of their civilization, all while trying to return to the rule of hereditary elites, even in the United States.
sentences.zh: “爱泼斯坦阶级”的美德标志着道德和文明的优越性，同时试图回归世袭精英的统治，即使在美国也是如此。

sentences.en: Rather than reverse the gains of the Enlightenment, we take the side of our ancestors who fought a centuries-long battle for individual liberty, scientific progress, decentralized markets, bottom-up democracy, and the emancipation of humanity from feudal monarchs and their make-believe mythologies.
sentences.zh: 我们没有扭转启蒙运动的成果，而是站在我们的祖先一边，他们为个人自由、科学进步、去中心化市场、自下而上的民主以及人类从封建君主及其虚构的神话中解放出来进行了长达几个世纪的斗争。

blocks.html_en: • New forms of technology can reshape the world. Technology is not just a tool, but the world we live in and an extension of our cognitive capabilities. The co-operation of humans with the collective intelligence embedded in AI could accelerate human progress and overcome planetary crises such as climate change and atomic war that threatens the survival of our species.

sentences.en: New forms of technology can reshape the world.
sentences.zh: 新的技术形式可以重塑世界。

sentences.en: Technology is not just a tool, but the world we live in and an extension of our cognitive capabilities.
sentences.zh: 技术不仅仅是一种工具，更是我们生活的世界以及我们认知能力的延伸。

sentences.en: The co-operation of humans with the collective intelligence embedded in AI could accelerate human progress and overcome planetary crises such as climate change and atomic war that threatens the survival of our species.
sentences.zh: 人类与人工智能中嵌入的集体智慧的合作可以加速人类进步，克服威胁人类生存的气候变化和原子战争等全球危机。

blocks.html_en: • Live free or die trying. We must bear eternal vigilance in the struggle against fascism, and the battlefield is technology. There is no middle ground: Technologists must choose whether to work for the enslavement of humanity or to create new spaces for freedom.

sentences.en: Live free or die trying.
sentences.zh: 自由地生活，或者努力地死去。

sentences.en: We must bear eternal vigilance in the struggle against fascism, and the battlefield is technology.
sentences.zh: 我们在反法西斯斗争中必须永远保持警惕，战场就是技术。

sentences.en: There is no middle ground: Technologists must choose whether to work for the enslavement of humanity or to create new spaces for freedom.
sentences.zh: 没有中间立场：技术专家必须选择是为人类的奴役而努力，还是为自由创造新的空间。

content_html_zh:
作者：匿名·2026 年 7 月 20 日

  1. 在互联网上工作的程序员对整个世界而不是某个国家负有道义责任。 互联网自诞生之日起就被设计为一个无需审查即可共享知识的通用系统。 互联网不是任何一个政府或国家的财产。
  2. 互联网使大规模监视成为可能，其规模是盖世太保和契卡难以想象的。 太多的程序员浪费了生命来构建打着网络广告幌子的监控系统。 如今，Palantir 等公司正在使用这些网络跟踪系统来监视、控制甚至杀害人类，这些公司寻求将国家暴力与企业效率结合起来，从而创造一种新形式的技术法西斯主义。
  3. 以外部国家安全威胁为由的监视将转向民族国家内部的公民。 大规模监视曾经是国家安全局的专属领域，但如今它已被私有化给像 Palantir 这样的公司，这些公司对任何民主进程都不负责。 一开始是对外部外国民族国家的恐惧，后来转向内部，关注移民、持不同政见者，最终关注任何可能挑战现状或试图退出日益功能失调的社会的人。
  4. 每个人都是目标。 “内部敌人”不断扩大，直到涵盖一个国家的全体人民，无论他们的地位和信仰如何，这就证明了更加偏执和全面的监视是合理的。 警务和军事行动之间的界限变得模糊，法律框架被技术暴力所取代，而且完全不受惩罚。
  5. 只能通过构建软件和硬件来保卫自己来击败监视。 温顺地呼吁监管或道德化地要求人权在这个时代是没有用的。 任何权利都必须通过代码的硬实力来执行。 代码（而不是法律）可以用来维护隐私权，使监视变得困难（如果不是不可能的话），即使是民族国家的对手也是如此。
  6. 我们是由老年老人统治的。 与参加世界大战的几代人不同，我们现在的统治者大多数都是堕落的恋童癖者，他们会因为对财富和权力的幼稚渴望而牺牲年轻人和整个地球的福祉。 监视和自动化战争技术反映出他们日益绝望地试图维持古老的统治形式。
  7. 美利坚帝国正在瓦解。 曾经，美利坚合众国统治着一个可以通过美元作为全球储备货币的地位和同样的全球军事基地网络来执行其统治的世界。 如今，随着美国帝国因内部经济停滞、政治腐败和美元通胀而解体，新的地区大国直接挑战美国。
  8. 在真正的战争中，全面技术主导的幻想总是会适得其反。 当一架不露面的无人机杀死了一个孩子的父亲时，那个孩子有一天会不惜一切代价进行报复。 这是那些在舒适的郊区长大的人所忘记的事情。 超越零和游戏，只有证明你的胜利提供了更好的生活方式、更多的繁荣和鼓舞人心的哲学，才能真正赢得一场与人民的战斗。
  9. 奇怪的是，全自动战争的支持者支持通用草案。 在内心深处，这些键盘战士知道，当面对进行不对称战争的坚定对手时，他们的技术法西斯幻想只是纸老虎。 他们也知道自己的孩子不会为自己的国家而战，但他们会很高兴看到别人的孩子装在裹尸袋里回家。
  10. 问题不在于是否会制造人工智能武器，而在于是否会制造人工智能武器。我们必须让建设者承担责任。 无论哪个国家部署自动杀人机器，都无法避免因将责任归咎于人工智能的花招而导致平民被谋杀和基础设施被破坏的情况。
  11. 原子战争即将来临。 随着各国争夺日益稀缺的自然资源而陷入战争，对德黑兰、基辅和其他冲突地区进行战术核打击的可能性又回到了历史舞台。 日益衰老和专制的统治者在部署核武器方面面临的障碍比以前更少，甚至可能愿意牺牲人类的生存来安抚自己的狭隘自负。
  12. 我们的目标是建立一个和平的世界，让每个人都能通过互联网获得力量。 现代战争是将年轻人送上绞肉机的典型游戏。 当一个人可以利用互联网为自己创造真正的财富和权力时，为什么要为腐败统治者的利益而牺牲呢？
  13. 我们应该为我们想要的世界而奋斗，并打造子孙后代所需的工具。 在这个全球动荡和资源战争的时期，和平主义无异于自杀，但真正的硬实力在于技术：程序员应该创造技术，以便在充满敌意的监视和控制的社会中过上自由的生活并繁荣发展。 去中心化是这些技术在不可避免的压制下生存的唯一途径。
  14. 国家不会帮助我们。 国家是一个垂死的前互联网机构，它越来越像一个由税收和债务推动的庞氏骗局。 今天活着的年轻人都不可能继承任何福利，例如福利和医疗保健。 技术可以支持另一种选择：将权力下放给个人和他们自愿加入的社区。
  15. 中心化且不透明的算法对言论自由构成威胁。 宣传是监视的另一面，因为持续的宣传会阻止任何人想到挑战这个体系。 社交媒体垄断企业促进宣传，制造普遍的愚蠢行为，同时压制那些敢于批评统治秩序的人，然后他们才能组织起来反对它。
  16. 相互建立新的社会组织形式对于生存至关重要。 政治和娱乐的传统媒体景观的存在分散了我们对建立跨境网络团结和分布式自治组织的注意力。 等级制国家与我们的关系就像中世纪教会和国王与股份公司和工会的形成一样重要。
  17. 数字身份是他们控制系统的下一步。 未来几年内，访问互联网（包括在欧洲和美国）将需要生物识别国民身份证，并以“保护儿童”为借口。 真正的目标是控制颠覆性政治内容的自由获取并阻止跨境交流，以防止新形式的自组织和抵抗的出现。
  18. 只有当一个人能够匿名时，他才是真正的自由。 不受审查和监视的表达自由是理性的自主运用和社会民主进化的重要先决条件。 技术必须通过保护互联网上的隐私权（不仅包括个人隐私，还包括私下交易和签订合同的权利），使我们能够有选择地向世界展示自己的自由，以便我们能够成为我们想成为的人。
  19. 美国创建了第一个全球监视国家，但它不会是最后一个。 太多人已经忘记了维基解密和斯诺登的揭露，或者可能认为这是理所当然的。 从中国到俄罗斯，世界各国正在创建更强大的全球监视系统和宣传机器。 Palantir 利用世界各国的私人防务合同，试图将自己打造成一个跨境全球秘密国家的操作系统，同时推行自己滑稽的民族主义版本。
  20. 文化战争是一场心理战。 “爱泼斯坦阶级”的美德标志着道德和文明的优越性，同时试图回归世袭精英的统治，即使在美国也是如此。 我们没有扭转启蒙运动的成果，而是站在我们的祖先一边，他们为个人自由、科学进步、去中心化市场、自下而上的民主以及人类从封建君主及其虚构的神话中解放出来进行了长达几个世纪的斗争。
  21. 新的技术形式可以重塑世界。 技术不仅仅是一种工具，更是我们生活的世界以及我们认知能力的延伸。 人类与人工智能中嵌入的集体智慧的合作可以加速人类进步，克服威胁人类生存的气候变化和原子战争等全球危机。
  22. 自由地生活，或者努力地死去。 我们在反法西斯斗争中必须永远保持警惕，战场就是技术。 没有中间立场：技术专家必须选择是为人类的奴役而努力，还是为自由创造新的空间。
